title: spilotantha segrex
side_effects: Spilotantha segrex can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased risk of liver damage, nausea, and vomiting due to its high toxicity. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can also lead to cardiovascular problems, including irregular heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Furthermore, improper use of the plant may cause kidney failure, which can be fatal if left untreated. In severe cases, excessive consumption of Spilotantha segrex can even lead to seizures and coma.
